name: kent-cli
description: Personal AI agent that runs on your Mac

scripts.tg:dev: curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/setWebhook" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://brave-armadillo-395.convex.site/telegram/webhook","secret_token":"0832f89ea86a001b4e84ae99e86ca4c6dd346bf0098ce39cb02df649e596c9ad"}' && echo ' → Telegram webhook → DEV'
scripts.tg:prod: curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/setWebhook" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://whimsical-hamster-371.convex.site/telegram/webhook"}' && echo ' → Telegram webhook → PROD'
scripts.tg:clear: curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/setWebhook" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url":""}' && echo ' → Telegram webhook cleared'
